name: Prosciutto Di Parma with a Grilled Fresh Fig
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Prosciutto di Parma, sliced paper thin
1/2 lb fresh arugula leaves, washed and spun dry to yield 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill or broiler.
2. Place 12 fig halves cut side down on grill and cook for 3 minutes. Remove and allow to cool.
3. In a mixing bowl, toss grilled figs, raw figs, rosemary, balsamic vinegar, Italian parsley, arugula, and extra Virgin olive oil.
4. Gently mix with hands so as not to break the figs up.
5. Divide the paper-thin Prosciutto onto 4 plates.
6. Divide fig salad and place on top of Prosciutto and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
